Originally just given the simple alphanumeric code '''N-2''' by the explorers who discovered it, the '''Entoo system''' was so unpromising that the explorers simply continued on their way. Since then, however, the system's name evolved into Entoo, and the only inhabited world, which orbited a gas giant, became known as [[Entooine]]. The system was relatively close to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] shipping lane.
